aggregate_takeaway: C05 cleanroom/plant EPC needs a revenue-recognition and margin bridge split. Hanyang/Sebo/Shinsung show genuine customer or delayed-recovery signals, while K-ensol, SGC E&C, and Sungdo show orderbook or revenue headlines that become high-MAE or low-MFE when delivery, margin, and cost risk are not confirmed.
